notes: 2026-06-11 GPU1 full-budget clean h96 scale test: D256/L12/loop5 12x12 FutureSeed+loop at source 4337212, preserving middle curriculum and extending 84-96 to 2400 steps (16-36:200,36-60:300,60-72:500,72-84:1400,84-96:2400), batch80/eval512/bfloat16.
